poly_resolution_rules:
In the upcoming MLB game between the Athletics and New York Yankees, scheduled for April 8 at 7:05PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Athletics" if the Athletics win the game.

This market will resolve to "New York Yankees" if the New York Yankees win the game.
